positive: A whimsical forest scene illustration. A group of friendly woodland animals (fox, deer, owl) are gathered around glowing bioluminescent mushrooms. The style should be soft, detailed watercolor digital painting with pastel color palettes and a highly cozy, storybook aesthetic. High detail, storybook illustration, volumetric lighting.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, harsh lines, photorealism
